items.headline: Gustavsson to start in goal for Wild in Game 2 against Avalanche NHL playoffs
items.description:
DENVER -- Filip Gustavsson will start in goal for the Minnesota Wild in Game 2 of the Western Conference Second Round against the Colorado Avalanche at Ball Arena on Tuesday (8 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN, TVAS, CBC).
It will be Gustavsson’s first appearance in the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. Jesper

items.headline: Nic Dowd making playoff impact for Vegas Golden Knights following trade
items.description:
LAS VEGAS -- When the Vegas Golden Knights considered whom to select from the Los Angeles Kings in the 2017 NHL Expansion Draft, they narrowed their choices to two players: Nic Dowd and Brayden McNabb.
"I think they took the right guy," Dowd said.
It's hard to argue with that.

items.headline: Coaches Room: Carolina Hurricanes have blueprint for success in Stanley Cup Playoffs
items.description:
The Coaches Room is a regular feature throughout the 2025-26 season by former NHL coaches and assistants who turn their critical gaze to the game and explain it through the lens of a teacher.

items.headline: NHL EDGE stats Buffalo Sabres Montreal Canadiens playoffs 2026
items.description: NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Today, we provide three underlying metrics to watch for in the upcoming Stanley Cup Playoffs series between the Buffalo Sabres and Montreal Canadiens.

items.headline: Victor Hedman stepped away from Tampa Bay Lightning for mental health
items.description:
Victor Hedman said he stepped away from the Tampa Bay Lightning this season to focus on his mental health.
"I've spent most of my life in this game, and nearly all of my career with this organization," Hedman said in a statement on social media before meeting with the media

items.headline: Noah Dobson expects to feel better for Canadiens in Eastern Second Round
items.description:
TAMPA -- Noah Dobson turned to his left in the Montreal Canadiens locker room at Benchmark International Arena on Sunday, trying to figure out what teammates Phillip Danault and Mike Matheson were doing.

items.headline: Eric Robinson to enjoy homecoming in Game 3 with Carolina
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Eric Robinson grew up going to Philadelphia Flyers games in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
The next one he attends will be very different.
The Carolina Hurricanes forward will be on the ice, instead of in the stands, for Game 3 of the Eastern Conference Second Round at

items.headline: Gavin McKenna, Ivar Stenberg likely to be top prize for winner of 2026 NHL Draft Lottery
items.description:
The opportunity to select a franchise-altering forward awaits the team holding the winning combination when the 2026 NHL Draft Lottery is held at NHL Network studios in Secaucus, New Jersey, on Tuesday (7 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN, TVAS).

items.headline: Stanley Cup Playoffs Playback for May 5, 2026
items.description: The Stanley Cup Playoffs are in full swing and NHL.com has it all covered. Each day, we will present Stanley Cup Playoffs Playback, your one-stop shop for all the action. Here’s a look at where things stand on Tuesday, May 5:

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks Vegas Golden Knights Game 1 recap May 4, 2026
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- Ivan Barbashev scored the go-ahead goal at 15:02 of the third period, and Vegas Golden Knights recovered for a 3-1 victory against the Anaheim Ducks in Game 1 of the Western Conference Second Round at T-Mobile Arena on Monday.

items.headline: Taylor Hall delivers despite 'B-minus' game for Carolina Hurricanes
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. – Taylor Hall could sense he wasn’t playing his best game.
Hall still found a way to be a difference-maker for the Carolina Hurricanes, though, in their 3-2 overtime victory against the Philadelphia Flyers in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Second Round at Lenovo Center on Monday.

items.headline: Philadelphia Flyers cannot finish job in overtime loss in Game 2
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- "It's got to go in."
Travis Konecny had the puck on his stick, in the middle of the offensive zone, just above the face-off circles.
The Philadelphia Flyers forward was 1-on-1 with Carolina Hurricanes goalie Frederik Andersen with 4:45 remaining in overtime.

items.headline: Philadelphia Flyers Carolina Hurricanes game 2 recap May 4 2026
items.description: RALEIGH, N.C. -- Taylor Hall scored at 18:54 of overtime to lift the Carolina Hurricanes to a 3-2 win against the Philadelphia Flyers in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Second Round at Lenovo Center on Monday.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs second round schedule television results
items.description: The second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs began Saturday with the Carolina Hurricanes defeating the Philadelphia Flyers 3-0. The second round continued on Sunday with the Colorado Avalanche defeating the Minnesota Wild 9-6.
